description: The Sage Smart Oven Pizzaiolo in Brushed Stainless Steel is a high-performance countertop oven capable of reaching 400 degrees Celsius to deliver authentic wood-fired results in your kitchen. This specific variant includes a removable ceramic pizza stone and a dedicated stainless steel pizza peel for professional handling. Its Element iQ system intelligently manages power across heating elements to mimic traditional brick oven environments. Designed for professional-grade domestic use, it features presets for Neapolitan and Deep Dish styles, ensuring precision heating for charred crusts.
features: 2100W power output; maximum temperature 400°C; Element iQ system utilises algorithms to steer heating power; three dedicated heat types (conductive, radiant, convective); active bottom heating elements; independent top deck heating elements; double-pane heat-resistant glass window; manual mode with magnet interface for crust/deck temp control.
uses: Neapolitan pizza; thin and crispy pizza; pan pizza; New York style pizza; frozen pizza; roasting vegetables; flatbreads.

accessories.name: Pizza Stone
accessories.description: Cordierite stone for conductive heat transfer and crisp bases.

accessories.name: Pizza Peel
accessories.description: Stainless steel peel for launching and retrieving pizzas.

accessories.name: Deep Dish Pan
accessories.description: Carbon steel pan for thick-crust or pan-style pizzas.

name: Sage the Smart Oven Pizzaiolo
